facts.fact: The insurer is FlexProtect Insurance Solutions.
The contract number is FPS-UL-24-03391.
The issue date is March 10, 2024.
The policy owner is Robert James Wilson.
The insured is Robert James Wilson.
Robert James Wilson's gender is Male.
Robert James Wilson's date of birth is November 15, 1982.
Robert James Wilson's age at issue is 41.
The specified amount (face value) is $400,000.
The planned premium is $200 per month.
The minimum premium is $75 per month.
The target premium is $200 per month.
The death benefit option is Level (Option A).
The primary beneficiary is Jennifer Ann Wilson (Wife) at 100%.
The contingent beneficiary Robert Wilson Jr. (Son) receives 50%.
The contingent beneficiary Emily Rose Wilson (Daughter) receives 50%.
Account Value is defined as the accumulation of premiums paid, less deductions for monthly charges and expenses, plus interest credited.
Cost of Insurance (COI) is defined as the monthly charge for the death benefit based on the insured's age, sex, and risk class.
The Monthly Deduction Date is defined as the 10th day of each month.
Surrender Charge is defined as a percentage-based charge applied if the policy is surrendered in the first 15 years.
The policy owner may pay premiums at any time and in any amount subject to stated limits.
The minimum premium payment is $75 per payment.
The maximum premium is $50,000 per year, subject to tax limitations.
Premiums are allocated to the Account Value after deduction of a 3% premium expense charge.
The policy owner may skip payments as long as the Account Value is sufficient to cover monthly deductions.
If Account Value falls below the amount needed to pay monthly charges, the policy will enter a 61-day grace period.
On each Monthly Deduction Date (the 10th of each month), the Cost of Insurance charge is deducted from Account Value.
On each Monthly Deduction Date, an administrative expense charge of $8.00 per month is deducted from Account Value.
On each Monthly Deduction Date, any outstanding policy loan interest is deducted from Account Value.
The Cost of Insurance is calculated as: (Specified Amount - Account Value) x Monthly COI Rate / 1,000.
COI rates are guaranteed not to exceed those shown in the rate schedule attached to the policy.
Interest is credited to Account Value daily based on the current credited interest rate.
The guaranteed minimum interest rate is 2.0% per annum.
The current credited interest rate is 3.5% per annum, subject to change monthly.
The insurer may declare different interest rates for different policy years or account value amounts.
Under Option A (Level Death Benefit), the death benefit equals the Specified Amount.
Under Option B (Increasing Death Benefit), the death benefit equals the Specified Amount plus Account Value.
The policy owner may change death benefit options subject to evidence of insurability if increasing coverage.
Changing death benefit options requires payment of a $50 processing fee.
The death benefit is paid minus any outstanding policy loans.
The policy owner may make partial withdrawals from Account Value at any time.
The minimum partial withdrawal amount is $500.
The maximum partial withdrawal is Account Value minus the amount needed to keep the policy in force.
Withdrawal charges in Years 1-10 are $25 per withdrawal.
There is no withdrawal charge in Years 11 and beyond.
Withdrawals reduce Account Value.
Withdrawals may reduce the death benefit if Account Value falls below the minimum required.
The maximum policy loan is 90% of current Account Value.
The loan interest rate is variable, equal to Moody's Corporate Bond Index + 1.5%, with a minimum of 4%, adjusted annually each January 1.
Loan interest may be paid annually or added to the loan balance.
An outstanding loan reduces the death benefit dollar-for-dollar.
The Cash Surrender Value equals Account Value minus Surrender Charge minus Outstanding Loans.
The surrender charge in Year 1 is 8% of Specified Amount.
The surrender charge in Year 5 is 5% of Specified Amount.
The surrender charge in Year 10 is 2% of Specified Amount.
There is no surrender charge in Year 15 and beyond.
Upon surrender, the policy terminates and coverage ends.
If the insured dies by suicide within 24 months of the issue date, the insurer pays only the Account Value, without interest.
The insurer may contest the policy for material misrepresentation within 2 years of the issue date while the insured is living.
If Account Value is insufficient to pay monthly deductions, the insurer will notify the policy owner and the policy continues for 61 days.
If sufficient premium is not received within the 61-day grace period, the policy lapses.
Upon lapse, any Account Value in excess of surrender charges will be paid to the policy owner automatically.
The policy was executed at Phoenix, Arizona.
The authorized signatory is the Chief Executive Officer of FlexProtect Insurance Solutions.
The policy execution date is March 10, 2024.
Jennifer Ann Wilson's relationship to the insured is Wife.
The surrender charge schedule applies for the first 15 years.
The minimum loan interest rate is 4% per annum.
The premium expense charge deducted from each premium payment is 3%.
The administrative expense charge is $8.00 per month.
